def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    
    # Calculate indicators
    df['ema_fast'] = ta.trend.EMAIndicator(df['close'], window=params['ema_fast']).ema_indicator()
    df['ema_slow'] = ta.trend.EMAIndicator(df['close'], window=params['ema_slow']).ema_indicator()
    df['atr'] = ta.volatility.AverageTrueRange(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=params['atr_window']).average_true_range()
    
    # Generate signals
    signals = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Long condition: fast EMA crosses above slow EMA and price > high of previous candle + ATR multiple
    long_condition = (df['ema_fast'] > df['ema_slow']) & (df['close'] > df['high'].shift(1) + params['atr_multiplier'] * df['atr'])
    
    # Short condition: fast EMA crosses below slow EMA and price < low of previous candle - ATR multiple
    short_condition = (df['ema_fast'] < df['ema_slow']) & (df['close'] < df['low'].shift(1) - params['atr_multiplier'] * df['atr'])
    
    signals[long_condition] = 1
    signals[short_condition] = -1
    
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: AUD/USD exhibits strong momentum breakouts when fast EMA crosses slow EMA combined with volatility expansion (ATR-based breakout threshold), capturing trending moves while filtering false breakouts.
